title: coreopsis grandiflora f. longipes
intro: Coreopsis grandiflora f. longipes, also known as long-stalked coreopsis, is a variety of the coreopsis grandiflora plant, a flowering perennial native to North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues, as it contains compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. Consuming the plant has been associated with various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Coreopsis grandiflora f. longipes can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine in the form of dried flowers or roots.
